summary: Completed testing of Invoices/PDF upload features and fixed critical PDF report generation bug. All backend APIs (12/12 tests) and frontend UI working correctly. Fixed reportlab Drawing-in-Table bug that was causing 520 errors on PDF report download.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - minor rendering issue on initial load
Hydration warning: span cannot be child of tbody in table

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/invoices - List invoices returns 200 OK
Backend: POST /api/invoices/upload-pdf-auto with Group A PDF (UC 113577680) - Parses correctly
Backend: POST /api/invoices/upload-pdf-auto with Group B PDF (UC 102480958) - Parses correctly
Backend: POST /api/invoices/upload-pdf-auto with non-PDF file - Returns 400
Backend: GET /api/plants - Lists plants for report
Backend: GET /api/reports/download-pdf with invalid month format - Returns 400
Backend: GET /api/reports/download-pdf for non-existent plant - Returns 404
Backend: E2E flow - Create UC, upload PDF, save invoice, delete invoice, cleanup UC
Frontend: Faturas page accessible via sidebar navigation
Frontend: Concessionaria dropdown shows COPEL and Energisa MS
Frontend: 'Enviar PDF' upload button present and functional
Frontend: Search input for invoices present
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard hydration warning: span element wrapping dynamic table rows - not a blocking issue but should be fixed for clean React hydration
seed_data_creation: Test UC 102480958 created and cleaned up during E2E test
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF report generation now works after fixing reportlab Drawing-in-Table compatibility issue. The pdf_generator_service.py was modified to use table border styling instead of Drawing objects in table cells. Test PDFs available at /tmp/113577680_geradora.pdf (Group A) and /tmp/102480958.pdf (Group B). All invoice upload and parsing features functional.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: PDF report generation failing with 'int() argument must be a string, a bytes-like object or a real number, not NoneType'
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.root_cause: reportlab 4.4.10 has compatibility issues when Drawing objects are placed directly in Table cells. The error occurred in Table.identity() when trying to calculate row heights
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Replaced Drawing-based accent bars with TableStyle LINEBEFORE styling. Also added None-value handling for trees_saved and consumer unit data fields
